basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Radiographer and Operation Theatre Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences, Faridkot (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: The Baba Farid University of Health Sciences, Faridkot (BFUHS) has officially announced the Radiographer and Operation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 7 full-time vacancies. Candidates with 10+2 Science qualification, B.Sc. in Radiography/Operation Theatre Technology, and relevant experience are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications from the official portal before 12 July 2026. Check the notification for eligibility criteria, age limit, salary details, and application process.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/BC: 5 years; Physical Handicapped: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen: as per rules (deduct service period + 3 years); Punjab Govt employees: up to 45 years; Widows/Divorcees: up to 40 years; Contract employees in BFUHS: equivalent to service period.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 with Science, B.Sc. in Radiography, B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology, Two years relevant experience
qualification.details: Radiographer: 10+2 or its equivalent from recognized Board/University/Institution with Science; B.Sc. in Radiography from a recognized University/Institution; Two years experience in the relevant field. Operation Theatre Assistant: 10+2 or its equivalent from recognized Board/University/Institution with Science; B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology from a recognized University/Institution; Two years experience in the relevant field.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level-5 (Rs. 29200/-) for Radiographer; Pay Level-3 (Rs. 21700/-) for Operation Theatre Assistant
salary_details.details: Radiographer: Pay Level-5 (Rs. 29200/-) Operation Theatre Assistant: Pay Level-3 (Rs. 21700/-)

selection_process: Written Test Merit List (inter-se-merit of written test and experience marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BFUHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BFUHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Radiographer: 10+2 or its equivalent from recognized Board/University/Institution with Science; B.Sc. in Radiography from a recognized University/Institution; Two years experience in the relevant field. Operation Theatre Assistant: 10+2 or its equivalent from recognized Board/University/Institution with Science; B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology from a recognized University/Institution; Two years experience in the relevant field.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/BC: 5 years; Physical Handicapped: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen: as per rules (deduct service period + 3 years); Punjab Govt employees: up to 45 years; Widows/Divorcees: up to 40 years; Contract employees in BFUHS: equivalent to service period.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Radiographer: Pay Level-5 (Rs. 29200/-) Operation Theatre Assistant: Pay Level-3 (Rs. 21700/-)

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Merit List (inter-se-merit of written test and experience marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BFUHS Radiographer and Operation Theatre Assistant posts is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Radiographer, candidates need 10+2 with Science and a B.Sc. in Radiography with two years of relevant experience. For Operation Theatre Assistant, 10+2 with Science and a B.Sc. in Operation Theatre Technology with two years of relevant experience are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to BFUHS jobs?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences. 5 vacancies are for the post of Radiographer and 2 vacancies are for the post of Operation Theatre Assistant.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Radiographer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Radiographer post will be placed in Pay Level-5, with a salary of Rs. 29,200/- per month. This is a good opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Operation Theatre Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Operation Theatre Assistant post comes under Pay Level-3, with a monthly salary of Rs. 21,700/-. This is a competitive salary for the role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve a Written Test. A Merit List will be prepared based on the inter-se-merit of the written test and experience marks.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of BFUHS. The application window opens on 22nd June 2026 and closes on 12th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
